destinations.name: Omkareshwar
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: allow a full intercity day and verify current route conditions.
destinations.whyVisit: Pair Mahakaleshwar with another Jyotirlinga on a sacred Narmada island.
destinations.suitability: Good for families; elderly visitors benefit from a slower overnight plan.

destinations.name: Maheshwar
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: best combined with Omkareshwar or an overnight stay.
destinations.whyVisit: Experience Ahilya Fort, elegant Narmada ghats, handloom traditions and a gentler pace.
destinations.suitability: Very family-friendly; ghat steps may require assistance for some elders.

destinations.name: Mandu
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: start early and keep a full day for the hilltop circuit.
destinations.whyVisit: Explore Jahaz Mahal, Afghan architecture and memorable plateau viewpoints.
destinations.suitability: Good for families; choose fewer monuments for elderly visitors.

destinations.name: Indore
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: usually the easiest nearby city from Ujjain; festival traffic can change this.
destinations.whyVisit: Combine Rajwada, airport convenience, shopping and one of India’s best vegetarian food scenes.
destinations.suitability: Excellent for families and elders when the day is paced around meals and rest.

destinations.name: Tincha Falls
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: verify seasonal access, weather and local safety advisories.
destinations.whyVisit: Add a monsoon-season waterfall and rural landscape break to a city-heavy itinerary.
destinations.suitability: Better for active families; uneven viewpoints may not suit all elderly visitors.

destinations.name: Sanchi
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: use Bhopal as the practical base and avoid a rushed Ujjain return.
destinations.whyVisit: See UNESCO-listed Buddhist stupas and one of India’s most important ancient heritage sites.
destinations.suitability: Educational and family-friendly; walking and sun exposure require planning.

destinations.name: Bhimbetka
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: combine with a Bhopal stay and verify site access.
destinations.whyVisit: Walk through prehistoric rock shelters, ancient paintings and a forested landscape.
destinations.suitability: Wonderful for families; uneven walking surfaces may be difficult for elders.

destinations.name: Bhopal
destinations.travelTime: Travel-time placeholder: treat Bhopal as a separate base in a longer Madhya Pradesh circuit.
destinations.whyVisit: Enjoy lake views, museums, food and easy access to Sanchi and Bhimbetka.
destinations.suitability: Excellent for families and elderly visitors with a comfortable hotel base.

tips.title: Avoid overpacking
tips.description: Choose one major destination per day instead of turning the journey into a checklist.

tips.title: Start early
tips.description: Early departures provide cooler weather, more daylight and a calmer return.

tips.title: Keep a Kumbh buffer
tips.description: Festival traffic, diversions and queues can add substantial travel time.

tips.title: Use Indore for clusters
tips.description: Indore is often the most practical base for Mandu, Maheshwar, Tincha Falls and food exploration.
